category_sources: source_facts.description says Universal boot loader; official U-Boot site describes U-Boot as a universal bootloader for embedded systems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is u-boot-tools; official project branding uses U-Boot.
docs_sources: Official U-Boot documentation is hosted at docs.u-boot.org; official source documentation page links source and release conventions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official U-Boot documentation says the source is maintained in Git and gives git clone https://source.denx.de/u-boot/u-boot.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a universal boot loader; source_facts.executables lists dumpimage, mkenvimage, and mkimage; official U-Boot site describes embedded-system boot support.
